name: Banana Split Jello Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the jello using juice from the oranges as part of the liquid.
2. Lay the sliced bananas at the bottom of a container.
3. Place the oranges on top of the bananas.
4. Carefully pour the jello over the bananas and oranges, ensuring they remain undisturbed.
5. Refrigerate until the jello is set.
6. Once the jello has set, add the Cool Whip to the top.
7. Sprinkle with nuts and cherries before serving.
